center.name: Johan Axel Palmén
center.summary: Johan Axel Palmén是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括西伯利亞銀鷗，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Vega gull, East Siberian gull, or East Siberian herring gull (Larus vegae) is a large gull of the herring gull/lesser black-backed gull complex which breeds in Northeast Asia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Vega gull, East Siberian gull, or East Siberian herring gull (Larus vegae) is a large gull of the herring gull/lesser black-backed gull complex which breeds in Northeast Asia
